What is the time complexity of Selection Sort?

cards.back: Insertion sort works by dividing the input into a sorted and an unsorted region. Each subsequent element from the unsorted region is inserted into the sorted region in its correct position.

cards.front: What is the best-case time complexity of Insertion Sort?
What is the purpose of the 'swapping' operation in sorting algorithms?
cards.back: The 'swapping' operation in sorting algorithms is used to swap the positions of two elements in the list to achieve the sorted order.
